'''Rogue 4'''<ref name="CCG-Rogue4" /> was an [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]<ref name="CCG-Snowspeeder" /> modified [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47]] [[Snowspeeder/Legends|snowspeeder]]. Assigned to [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]],<ref name="CCG-Rogue4" /> the vehicle was stationed at the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance's]] [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]] on the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].<ref name="ESB" /> Rogue 4 was assigned to be [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]]<ref name="CCG-Rogue4" /> alongside [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]] [[Kesin Ommis/Legends|Kesin Ommis]].<ref name="Warfare" />

The [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] on Rogue 4 were modified, giving the weapon an improved recharge rate. During the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], Rogue 4 was part of the Alliance's snowspeeder counterattack<ref name="CCG-Rogue4" /> against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] force of [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]].<ref name="ESB">{{Film|V}}</ref> Rogue 4 flew as [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader's]] [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]] during the battle.<ref name="CCG-Rogue4" />
